name: Video
summary: Theme-aware video player with lazy loading and fullscreen support; use it for playable media clips, and `Image` for static pictures.

bestPractices: Provide controls and captions; prefer muted autoplay only when appropriate.
Use poster images for better perceived performance.
Constrain size and avoid layout shift; select fit modes deliberately.
Avoid background video for critical content; ensure text contrast remains accessible.
Respect reduced motion preferences and keep transitions subtle.
Lazy‑load non‑critical media and prefetch only when beneficial.
